CGC Display Assessment
Privacy & Data Notice

Before you
begin.

APEX captures session data, scores, and photos to help CGC field teams evaluate in-store displays. Read the key points before continuing.

Operated by Mars CGC, London Paddington.
Data stored locally on this device only.
Sessions exportable and deletable at any time.
01 — Data
🔒 What we collect
Session scores, display ratings, assessor notes, and timestamps. No personal shopper data. All data remains on this device unless you export it.
02 — Photos
📷 Photo usage
Photos document display conditions only. Stored locally, included only in exports you initiate. Do not photograph people without consent.
03 — Access
👥 Visibility
Only users with access to this device and any exports you share. Handle in line with your organisation's data guidelines.
By continuing you confirm you have read this notice and agree to use APEX in accordance with your organisation's policies.
